title: Personal & Corporate Banking | MSME & Agri banking - IDBI Bank
content:
IDBI Bank introduces special saving accounts for the Youth. "Advantage Prime" savings account is a specially designed product for today’s youth. The objective is to establish a bond with the Youth and help them to inculcate financial discipline.
  * ATM cash withdrawal limit and Point of Sale limit through ATM card is Rs. 25,000/- per day


  * Free five ATM transactions at other Bank ATMs at Non Metro Locations


  * Preference for Project work at Bank (subject to availability of seats)
  * Discounted charges for opening of share trading account with ICMS


Get a Advantage Prime Saving Account in 3 easy steps.
Call on our Phone Banking numbers Toll Free - (24x7 service)

metadata.description: Youth Savings account from IDBI bank coined as Advantage Prime Savings Account helps in accomplishing the dreams of youth by providing financial solutions to them.
